description: Get ready to experience comfort like never before with these Benton floaters from fila. Comfortable yet sturdy, these sandals are great for a stroll in the park or a walk on a trek trail. UpperSynthetic upper with perforations on tha strap and velcro fasteners for easy adjustment to attain a snug FitCushioned inners for greater comfortEmbossed logo on the side of the ankle strap for stylePrinted and textured footbedOutsoleTPU outsole with branching groovesSandal careWipe surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
